summary: Command Center feature testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all components verified: Header with LIVE indicator and stats, Live Safety Map with dark CartoDB tiles and SOS markers, Incident Feed with severity badges and timestamps, AI Safety Alerts panel, Guardian Journeys panel, and System Metrics panel showing API latency, Database pool, and Redis status.

TestAuthentication.test_login_returns_admin_role: PASS - Admin login returns access_token and admin role

TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_command_center_returns_data: PASS - Returns active_incidents array (takes ~11s cold start)
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_command_center_incident_structure: PASS - Incident objects have proper structure

TestQueueHealth.test_queue_health_returns_data: PASS - Returns queues section with incident, ai_signal, notification

TestSSEStream.test_sse_stream_endpoint_exists_with_tok: PASS - SSE endpoint available via token query param

frontend_tests.command_center_route: PASS - /command-center route accessible for admin user
frontend_tests.live_indicator: PASS - Green pulsing LIVE indicator visible

header_stats.uptime: PASS - Shows uptime (updates from 1m to 2m during test)

frontend_tests.live_safety_map: PASS - Dark CartoDB tiles rendering, SOS markers visible as red dots on Mumbai area
frontend_tests.incident_feed: PASS - Shows 20 incidents with SOS ALERT, FALL DETECTED types
frontend_tests.severity_badges: PASS - 'critical' severity badges visible on incidents
frontend_tests.timestamps: PASS - AM/PM timestamps visible on each incident
frontend_tests.ai_safety_alerts_panel: PASS - Panel visible with Risk Spikes, Heatmap, Anomalies sections
frontend_tests.guardian_journeys_panel: PASS - Panel visible with 'X active' indicator
frontend_tests.system_metrics_panel: PASS - Panel visible with API latency, Database pool, Redis status
frontend_tests.command_center_button_in_admin: PASS - 'Command Center' button visible in Admin Panel header
frontend_tests.auto_refresh: PASS - Uptime counter incrementing (10s refresh observed)

critical_code_review_comments: CommandCenterPage.jsx: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes, parallel API fetching, 10s auto-refresh interval
LiveSafetyMap.jsx: React-Leaflet with CartoDB dark tiles, proper SOS marker icons with pulsing animation
IncidentFeed.jsx: Good sorting of incidents by created_at, merges SSE events with DB incidents
SystemMetrics.jsx: Comprehensive display of API latency, DB pool stats, Redis status, and queue health
SSE connection: Minor console errors 'SSE error: TypeError: network error' observed but does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: None - used existing incident data from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center feature at /command-center is fully functional. Uses existing APIs: /api/operator/command-center (takes ~11s on cold start), /api/admin/monitoring/metrics, /api/admin/monitoring/queue-health. SSE at /api/stream?token=... for real-time events. Map centered on Mumbai (19.076, 72.877) with CartoDB dark tiles. Redis queue service uses in-memory fallback in preview env.

notes.sse_errors: SSE error messages in console are from network timeout during long-polling, does not affect core functionality
notes.command_center_cold_start: First request to /api/operator/command-center takes ~11 seconds due to heavy DB query - this is documented and expected
